title: Swimmingly
description: Adds More Fishing Progression and content through Exploration
body:
# New Content
The new content from this datapack include:
- More Fishing Rods starting from Wood and going up to Netherite
- 34 new Biome and Structure specific fish
- fishing related advancements
## Changes to Existing things
The changes from this datapack include:
- Fishing rod requires flint
- Retextured fishing bobber
- Redone fishing loot tables
- Junk can only be fished in areas without fish
- Treasure is more common
### Other
if you find bugs report them in the bug and issue reports channel in the discord
Polymer Autohost needs to be enabled for the texture pack to work
